title: VLANs, Trunks, STP, Aggregation, and MTU · Packet Lens: Net Trunks Native Voice
summary: Segment a campus switch fabric for staff, voice, guest, management, and redundant uplinks. Planned artifact: Add and verify the net trunks native voice increment in a verified switched campus configuration plan. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Configure 802.1Q trunks, allowed VLANs, native VLAN, and voice VLAN behavior without mismatch or leakage.
Create VLANs and assign access interfaces while matching documentation, endpoint purpose, and broadcast-domain boundaries.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

starterFiles.shell:
# comptia-network-plus safe operations evidence notebook
# Commands run only in the deterministic browser simulator.
# Add one observation, command, expected signal, and conclusion per activity.
